instruction: How can I sum amounts from a Source sheet using SUMIFS when a user can select up to 3 territories for a product, with an 'All' option that sums all amounts? I need a formula that can handle multiple territory choices in one criteria using an 'OR' logic, or a more elegant alternative.SUMIFS(Source!$C:$C,Source!$A:$A,$C$2,Source!$B:$B,$C11)
